Quantum Electrical Solutions LLC
Quantum Electrical Solutions LLC, 3811 N Alvin St, Greenville, WI (Owned by: Daniel Krupka) holds a Electrical Contractor, Regular, False license and 9 other licenses according to the Wisconsin Rapids license board.
Their BuildZoom score of 94 ranks in the top 24% of 94,017 Wisconsin licensed contractors.
Their license was verified as active when we last checked. If you are thinking of hiring Quantum Electrical Solutions LLC, we recommend double-checking their license status with the license board and using our project planner to get competitive quotes.
